# OpenDDIL Contracts — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/
# This file helps AI coding assistants understand the project.

> OpenDDIL Contracts is the language-agnostic Protobuf schema repository for the OpenDDIL framework.
> It defines all event shapes used across Edge SDKs and HQ processors.
> It is the single source of truth — no event types are defined outside this repo.

## Project Purpose
Defines Protobuf v3 contracts for the OpenDDIL CQRS event-driven architecture.
Events are serialized with Protobufs for bandwidth efficiency in DDIL environments.

## Architecture
- Every domain event is wrapped in a CloudEvents v1.0 envelope (cloud_event.proto).
- The envelope uses google.protobuf.Any for the payload, making it type-agnostic.
- DDIL-specific extensions: user_id, edge_node_id, sequence (outbox ordering).
- Domain events are organized by bounded context (e.g., openddil.inventory.v1).

## Key Files
- proto/openddil/events/v1/cloud_event.proto: CloudEvents envelope message.
- proto/openddil/inventory/v1/inventory_events.proto: ItemAllocatedEvent.
- Makefile: Compiles .proto → Python (_pb2.py) and C# (.cs).
- gen/python/: Generated Python classes (gitignored, compile via make python).
- gen/csharp/: Generated C# classes (gitignored, compile via make csharp).

## Domain Events
- ItemAllocatedEvent: Edge operator allocates inventory. Fields: event_id, item_id, quantity, original_count_at_action, timestamp, user_id.

## Schema Evolution Rules
- ADDITIVE ONLY: New fields get new field numbers. Never reuse or renumber.
- NEVER REMOVE: Mark fields as reserved instead of deleting.
- VERSION VIA PACKAGES: Breaking changes → new package version (v1 → v2).
- BACKWARD COMPATIBLE: Old consumers must deserialize new messages (unknown fields ignored).

## Tech Stack
- Protocol Buffers v3 (proto3 syntax)
- protoc compiler
- google.protobuf.Timestamp and google.protobuf.Any well-known types
- CloudEvents v1.0 specification
- Make (GNU Make)

## Polyrepo Context
- openddil-stack: Docker Compose, Atlas schemas, server infra.
- openddil-contracts (this repo): Language-agnostic Protobuf schemas.
- openddil-edge-dotnet / openddil-edge-python: Edge SDKs consuming these contracts.
- openddil-hq-dotnet / openddil-hq-python: HQ SDKs consuming these contracts.
